data.title: Elevra Lithium Quarterly Activities Report
data.description: In Brisbane, Australia, on April 22, 2026, Elevra Lithium Limited reported notable operational achievements. The company, trading as ELV on the ASX and ELVR on the NASDAQ, announced a successful quarter with enhanced operational performance, generating positive cash flow. Elevra also highlighted advancements in its growth portfolio during the period.

data.title: The 2026 NAB Show Wraps with Proof the Future of Media and Entertainment is Expanding Beyond Broadcasting
data.description: At a recent event held in Las Vegas, over 58,000 attendees registered for the 2026 NAB Show. This indicates the event's significant role in the ongoing transformation of the global media and entertainment industry.

data.title: Exicure Announces Co-Development Agreement with Adbiotech for Burixafor (GPC-100)
data.description: Exicure has recently signed a co-development agreement with Adbiotech to further develop Burixafor (GPC-100) combination therapies for various medical conditions. This collaboration aims to advance the development of potential drug treatments across multiple indications.

data.title: Gold Reserve Welcomes Venezuela’s New Mining Law
data.description: Gold Reserve Ltd. announced an update on Venezuela's new mining law, officially enacted and published on April 16, 2026, following a previous release on March 16, 2026. The law, detailed in Official Gazette of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela No. 7.020 Extraordinario, signifies a modernization of the country's mining regulations. Gold Reserve Ltd. holds the symbols TSX-V: GRZ, BSX: GRZ.BH, OTCQX: GDRZF.

data.title: Rio Tinto donates A$1.5m to WA Department of Fire and Emergency Services to help with Severe Tropical Cyclone Narelle recovery
data.description: In Perth, Australia, Rio Tinto has pledged a donation of A$1.5 million to aid communities affected by Severe Tropical Cyclone Narelle in Western Australia. The contribution, directed towards the Department of Fire and Emergency Services (DFES), aims to assist in the relief and recovery endeavors in areas impacted by the cyclone. This support extends to various Western Australian communities affected by Severe Tropical Cyclone Narelle, bolstering both immediate recovery efforts and initiatives geared towards long-term preparedness and resilience. The cyclone made its way along the Pilbara coast, prompting this response from Rio Tinto.

data.title: Strong results achieved in world-first Graphene enhanced cement roof tile trial
data.description: A trial production of roof tiles enhanced with graphene by FP McCann has shown a significant reduction in CO2 emissions, with a decrease of up to 14%. The project, carried out in the United Kingdom, also revealed a 26% cut in the CEM I-to-concrete ratio needed for manufacturing concrete roof tiles. This innovation demonstrates the potential for graphene enhanced roof tiles to be utilized in reducing environmental impact and enhancing sustainability in construction projects.

data.title: MoonPay Invests in Korean Fintech Pioneer Finger, Laying Groundwork for a Korean Won Stablecoin Ecosystem
data.description: A significant partnership valued at around $76 million has been established between Sungho Electronics, Pantos Holdings, and MoonPay. The agreement intends to integrate MoonPay's international cryptocurrency payments system with Finger's local financial software network. This collaboration marks a substantial move within the industry. The leading crypto payments network, MoonPay, which is listed on the KOSDAQ, disclosed this development in New York on April 22, 2026.

data.title: SkillsUSA, Industry Giants to Celebrate Thousands of Students Committing to Essential Careers
data.description: In Leesburg, Virginia, a significant event is set to take place on May 6, 2026. It will celebrate the unsung heroes of the American economy, including welders, cyber-technicians, chefs, and builders. This event aims to highlight their importance and showcase their skills. SkillsUSA, a prominent organization in workforce development, is orchestrating this event. It marks a shift in the usual attention given to sports stars, as the focus will now be on these vital professions. The event is expected to draw a large crowd, emphasizing the recognition and appreciation for these skilled professionals.

data.title: Rogers Communications Announces Voting Results from Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Today, in Toronto, Rogers Communications Inc. (TSX: RCI.A and RCI.B) (NYSE: RCI) disclosed the outcomes of its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders as mandated by the Toronto Stock Exchange. This meeting, held on April 22, 2026, presented crucial voting data from shareholders to the Company.

JAPAN'S NIKKEI FUTURES UP 0.07% IN EARLY TRADING

data.title: SK hynix Announces 1Q26 Financial Results
data.description: The company has announced a record-breaking quarterly performance, with revenues reaching 52.5763 trillion won, operating profit at 37.6103 trillion won, and a net profit of 40.3459 trillion won. This outstanding achievement was primarily attributed to the surge in sales of high value-added products due to strong demand for artificial intelligence technologies. Looking ahead, the company plans to maintain its momentum by introducing more advanced products in the market.

data.title: HKMA reopens 3-year HKD bond with 6.12x oversubscription. Bids reach HK$4.59B, yielding 2.331%.
data.description: The recent tender for Hong Kong's 3-year HKD government bond attracted bids totaling HK$4.59 billion, resulting in a bid-to-cover ratio of 6.12. The annualized yield for the bonds was set at 2.331%.

data.title: Hong Kong reopens 7-year bond series, selling $1.25B at 2.656% yield. Bids reach $7.655B with a 6.12 bid-to-cover ratio.
data.description: The HKMA has effectively relaunched its 7-year HKSAR bond series, receiving bids totaling $7.655 billion for the $1.25 billion issued. This reflects a robust bid-to-cover ratio of 6.12.

data.title: Hong Kong issued $1B in 15-year bonds with a 3.313% yield, attracting $4.46B in bids, showcasing strong demand.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) recently released 15-year Hong Kong Special Administrative Region (HKSAR) bonds at a 3.313% yield. The issuance received an overwhelming response, with bids totaling HK$4.46 billion, marking a remarkable 4.46 times oversubscription compared to the initial offering of HK$1 billion. This significant oversubscription underlines the robust demand for the bonds in the market.
$AMD has crossed $300. Congratulations to the AMD bulls.

data.title: Bitcoin aims for monthly peak over $80K with positive market indicators. Traders gear up in futures, but will a cap hold at $83K-$88K?
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is edging closer to $80,000 as recent data indicates that traders are positioning themselves in the futures markets. There is speculation regarding whether potential profit-taking will occur within the range of $83,000 to $88,000, which could potentially act as a limiting factor on the current rally.

data.title: Hyundai Motor Connects with Next Generation of Football Fans through 'Hyundai NEXT Cup Tour' on 'Top Eleven'
data.description: Hyundai Motor, in partnership with Nordeus, unveils the 'Hyundai NEXT Cup Tour,' an interactive in-game experience on the well-known mobile football management game, 'Top Eleven: Be a Football Manager.' This initiative stems from Hyundai Motor's extensive football legacy of over 25 years, expanding its reach beyond the sport.
